title: Brackit Interior Walls & Ceiling Painter’s Kit- 17-Piece Decorators’ Supplies - for Indoor Painting with Rollers, Paint Brush, Paint Tray, and More - with a Complete Paint Roller Kit for Decorating
features: COMPLETE SET: Our interior walls and ceiling set contains 17 pieces including all your essentials such as 1 x dual-purpose large paint tray, 1 x painter tool, 1 x 2”wooden handle paint brush, 1 x paint stirrer, 1 x 9” roller frame, 1 telescopic pole, 2 x roller sleeves, 1 x ceiling roller, 1 pair of gloves, 1 roll decorators masking tape, 1 pack of dust sheet (1mx3m), 5 sandpaper sheets (assorted grits) and 1 x paint brush cover

SUPERIOR QUALITY: Our walls and ceiling painter’s kit is manufactured from top quality materials to ensure high performance and smooth finish along with long- lasting durable use for your DIY, painting and decorating projects. An ALL IN 1 paint roller and brush set that is delivered in a premium cardboard box for easy storage and recycling.

MULTIPLE ROOMS: Our interior painter’s kit has been specifically developed to offer versatility and convenience, so you only need one paint roller kit to complete your home! Perfect for bedrooms, living rooms, kitchen, bathroom and more.

ERGONOMIC DESIGN: Designed with comfort and amazing results in mind, Brackit’s painting kit provides superior grip with its ergonomic design. Our painting roller set’s accessories have special features to enable ease of use, but are also washable and reusable, so you can rely on this paint roller kit to perform again and again whenever they’re needed and easily stored away to take up minimal space.

TRUSTED BRAND: Brackit’s professional paint roller set and all other products are designed and tested to ensure high performance standards and are relied upon by DIY enthusiasts and professionals to provide dependable good value products like this roller for painting. Our paint rollers and trays sets and accessories are CE/UKCA approved.
description: From the brand Previous page MASKING TAPE PRECISION FINISH: At Brackit we recognize that a roll of masking tape is an essential tool that shouldn’t fail. We aim to give you that precision finish every time whether you’re painting a wall or windows edges through the perfect combination of adhesion and quality of crepe paper to construct the right masking tape so you can work with confidence. Empowering Your DIY Projects Visit the store A plastic dust sheet is a versatile protective covering designed to shield surfaces from dust, dirt, and spills during painting or renovation projects. Made from durable, lightweight polyethylene, it’s easy to lay down and remove. Next page
